rulings.Case Title: ZOILA ACOSTA MURCIA ET AL VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 12, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, DEUTSCHE BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS DENIED. Claims are sufficiently stated. The Court notes that Defendant failed to cite any authority for the proposition that Defendant is entitled for file serial motions for judgment on the pleadings; defendant also fails to cite any authority on point (some cases are cited for black letter contract law) regarding its substantive arguments. See (Motion 12:8-14:1). =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. PATRICIA HARRIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 12, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT TERRANCE HALL HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION DENIED. Hearing required to address why OSC Re: Contempt shall not be issued against Defendant's counsel. Claim of Right to Poseidon is DENIED. Mr. Hall failed to file a code-compliant mandatory form for Post Judgment Claim of Right to Possession. However, the Court will repeat again, neither the judgment in this case, nor the writ issued based on the judgment is applicable to anyone other than Ms. Harris. Based on the information on the record, Ms. Harris is now deceased. To the extent Plaintiff wishes to proceed with recovery of possession of the premises from anyone other than Ms. Harris, Plaintiff has to obtain a valid judgment and a writ against such individuals by any proper means. Again, possession of premises cannot be recovered from Mr. Hall under current judgment and writ. The Court so stated in its March 5, 2019 Order. Hearing required to address why OSC Re: Contempt shall not be issued against Defendant's counsel. Per CCP 1174.3(h) "The claim of right to possession shall be made on the following form." The form is included within this CCP section. Defendant modified legally mandated form and provided it to the sheriff on March 6, 2019. No explanation was provided for modification, no authority is provided for the modification or for legal effect of the modification, and claim made based on the modification. (The Court is in reciept of of Points and Authorities submitted at 1:30 p.m. on March 11, 2019. Still no viable explaination provided). The Court also notes that the modification to the form is made in such a format as to suggest that the modified language is the original language of the form (the original code-compliant language removed and new language inserted in a font similar to the font used for the rest of the form). Counsel to file a declaration no later than 9:00 a.m. on March 12, 2019 explaining why OSC Re: Contempt as to submission of modified and noncompliant form to the sheriff on March 6, 2019 shall not be issued. =(501/REQ)
Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 12, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT DARREN KEARL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. =(501/REQ)
